title: Hunters & the Hunt
subtitle: Meat, hide, and feather from the wild

pages.text: Hunters range out onto unclaimed land to stalk and fell wild animals, bringing back meat, hide, and feather that no pen can provide. They are an early food source that also feeds the tannery and fletching chains.

The hunt is immersive: calm prey is stalked in a crouch, but a spooked animal flees and must be chased. A hunter armed with a spear opens the engagement with a thrown strike. Archery later lets them take game from the treeline before it ever notices them.
How an animal is killed affects the &6hide quality&r it yields at the tannery, so the hunter's weapon and approach matter beyond just the kill.
